author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone 

Thank you for the incredible support since the launch of Faction Fleet (SCORE). 

The year of 2022 has undoubtedly had speedbumps but the community's support never wavered. To show appreciation to our community for sticking with us through everything, and to celebrate one year of SCORE, we'll be dropping 3 different Pearce X4 skins based on the amount of days you have enlisted ships in Faction Fleet.

7+ Days Enlisted: Suntiger Pearce X4 Skin
150+ Days Enlisted: RedX-IV Pearce X4 Skin
300+ Days Enlisted: Blue Tigu Pearce X4 Skin

Attachments:
